text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I wanted to talk to you about the Satsuki
Sho. I don't think I'm ready to run in it just yet.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just don't feel adequate enough to nail the race
when things come down to the wire... So, please,
can I just watch this as a spectator?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black looks extremely frustrated as she
makes her request through gritted teeth. She
must be truly agonized by this situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we decide to pass up the Satsuki Sho
and just observe it this time. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We witness something incredible at the end of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Aaand they're through the last turn! What's this?
Brusquement has been forced all the way to the
outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She hurriedly tries to make it back on the inside,
but can she still make up the lost distance?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ohhh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! Things aren't looking great for her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement! She should be picking up speed
during this critical moment, but—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her momentum is disrupted, and she's forced to
slow down. There's no way she can rally back after
that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! She's ever the wild runner. The race would
be over for any other run-of-the-mill
Umamusume, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show us what you're made of, Brusquement. Show
us your refined, potent ability to clear any
obstacle.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But look! Brusquement is closing in fiercely from
the outside as if nothing ever happened! And—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She outruns all the others in one fell swoop! She's
passed the finish line in first plaaace! What
power! What sheer strength and speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... What was that? What was with that final
burst of speed?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible. No one should be able to
pull that off, but Brusquement made it look
easy...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement's fast, but the speed at which you
started celebrating was incredible too, Air
Groove! Both of you were on mega-Bakushin
levels!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering why you were pumping your fists
in triumph when the race was so far from being
done!
choice_data_list: ...?! Could it be you knew from the beginning?
...?! Could it be you knew from the beginning?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after that huge blunder Brusquement made
in the middle of the race, Air Groove never had
any doubts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had full confidence that Brusquement was
going to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Air Groove is swarmed by
reporters hoping to interview her.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That was quite a dramatic win Brusquement had
today, Air Groove! It's unbelievable she was able
to take back the lead from that position!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Will Brusquement be heading straight into the
Derby next? Or will she run another race first?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is her trainer's decision to make. However, if
you wish for my opinion as her advisor...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I believe there's no issue if she runs in the Derby
next. Tokyo's long straightaways will be no match
for the acceleration she displayed today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So many eyes are on Brusquement... I can't really
blame people for being invested in her after that
race, but still...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how starkly different we are when
it comes to seizing decisive moments... Ngh... I
don't stack up to her at all yet...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Chin up! Don't let this eat at you! The Classic
Triple Crown's barely even started!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to turn your eyes away from the
finish line! Keep your head up and keep heading
toward tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's pep talk pulls Kitasan Black
out from the dumps. I hope today's shock won't
keep her from moving forward and improving.
